pi_items.source: Verified against task description and verifier.py logic.
Verified against setup_task.sh which populates the initial watchlist with these exact tickers.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated data to populate the JStock watchlist. The target order ['MSFT', 'NVDA', 'AAPL'] exactly matches the task description instructions. The required stocks ['MSFT', 'NVDA', 'AAPL', 'GOOGL', 'AMZN'] are correctly populated by setup_task.sh. The watchlist path '/home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/watchlist/My Watchlist/realtimestock.csv' matches the path used across all setup and export scripts.
